content: Also of note was a pen brown ink sketch by Rembrandt of "An Artist in a Studio" 11 Of more local interest is a watercolour painting produced in about 1850 and details the areas of Far Cotton and Delapré, as they looked at the time
summary: Also of note was a pen brown ink sketch by Rembrandt of "An Artist in a Studio" 11 Of more local interest is a watercolour painting produced in about 1850 and details the areas of Far Cotton and Delapré, as they looked at the time
